## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] spec
- [ ] schema
- [ ] example
- [ ] registry
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] reference API
- [ ] contract
- [ ] tooling
- [ ] security
- [ ] PQC

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated related specs.
- [ ] I updated related schemas.
- [ ] I updated examples if needed.
- [ ] I updated registries if needed.
- [ ] I considered privacy impact.
- [ ] I considered security impact.
- [ ] I considered PQC/crypto-agility impact.
- [ ] I did not add sensitive data to examples.
- [ ] JSON files parse successfully.
- [ ] Links were checked where practical.

## Related Issues

Link related issues.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out areas that need careful review.
